creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Spun off from bug 265127 comment 2. 

At <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/mirrors/#svn-intro>: 

> … Changes from the git repo on the stable/11, stable/12 and 
> related releng branches are exported to the subversion repository. …

<https://www.freebsd.org/security/#sup> stable/11 is no longer a supported release. 

<https://www.freebsd.org/security/unsupported/> 11.4 became end of life 2021-09-30. <https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/log/?h=stable/11> shows a number of more recent commits, I can't guess whether any of these were exported to the Subversion repo …

… in any case, it's timely to remove stable/11 from this part of the FreeBSD Handbook.
